actions.draft: Routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis introduces significant prompt engineering challenges; subtle shifts in framing can dramatically alter model outputs, necessitating robust calibration and adversarial testing. The macro-investing domain also demands careful consideration of “hallucination” mitigation—a single fabricated data point can have serious consequences. Ultimately, building trust requires a layered approach, not just clever prompting.
actions.reasoning: My work involves architecting AI agents for complex decision-making, including routing LLMs and orchestrating tools, which aligns directly with the described project.
